variant: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

request.message: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

response_body.response:
here are the sleep + muscle growth numbers: **7–9 hours** nightly is the evidence-based target for optimal recovery and hypertrophy. **~70–80% of daily growth hormone** is released during slow-wave sleep within the first 2 hours. sleep deprivation under 6 hours reduces testosterone by **10–15%** within a week and suppresses GH pulse amplitude.

a **60-minute wind-down** before bed measurably improves slow-wave sleep quality, and keeping your room at **65–68°f (18–20°c)** is linked to better deep-sleep architecture. on the muscle side: natural muscle gain rate is **0.25–0.5 lb/week** (0.5–2 lb/month) for intermediate lifters; beginners can hit **1–2 lb/month** in the first year.

muscle protein synthesis stays elevated for **24–48 hours** post-training and peaks **4–6 hours** after a session.

products.name: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
products.description: 24g whey isolate per scoop — third-party tested, low-cost per gram.
